You create components by subclassing [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKEntity] to implement reusable behavior. Then, use this method to incorporate the behavior of a component class into that entity.

An entity’s [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKEntity/components] list never has more than one instance of any component class—if the entity already contains a component of the same class as the `component` parameter, calling this method will replace that component.

# addComponent(_:)

**Instance Method**

Adds a component to the entity.

## Declaration

```swift
func addComponent(_ component: GKComponent)
```

## Parameters

- **component**: An instance of a [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKComponent] subclass.

## Discussion

You create components by subclassing [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKEntity] to implement reusable behavior. Then, use this method to incorporate the behavior of a component class into that entity.

An entity’s [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKEntity/components] list never has more than one instance of any component class—if the entity already contains a component of the same class as the `component` parameter, calling this method will replace that component.

## Managing an Entity’s List of Components

- **components**: The entity’s list of components.

sections.title: Managing an Entity’s List of Components
